title: Workflow-reviewer return
description: Return shape for the workflow-reviewer-phase<N>: / -pass<N>: / -cycle<N>: subagent family. Fires between each onboarding phase / coverage-expansion pass / journey-mapping cycle. Gates the next transition: on approve, the orchestrator advances; on reject (cap 3), the orchestrator surgically fixes per findings + re-dispatches the same reviewer; on the 3rd consecutive reject the reviewer returns escalated-to-user and the run pauses for human triage.

cycle.description: Journey-mapping cycle being reviewed (workflow-reviewer-cycle<N> only). Distinct from the handover envelope's cycle field (which records the reviewer's own dispatch cycle, capped at 3).

checklist.description: Per-item pass/fail of the canonical methodology exit criteria.

findings.description: Surgical fix list. Required when verdict == 'reject'. Empty when verdict == 'approve'.

attestation.description: One-line summary of what was verified. Required when verdict == 'approve'.

authorizer.description: Required when the reviewer approves a skip / early-stop transition. Must carry either a verbatim user quote OR a documented structural exception (e.g. 'phase6-redundant-with-phase5: depth Pass 4+5 already provided adversarial coverage; user pre-authorised via args').

reviewerCycle.description: Which workflow-reviewer dispatch this is for the phase / pass / cycle. The orchestrator increments per reject.
